title: T-047 — UI: TEC-040 Allergen Profile Editor + cascade preview
prompt: Build TEC-040 (Allergen Profile Editor) and embedded TEC-041 cascade preview tab per §10.7. Match `allergen_declaration_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:309-347. Profile editor lives as Item Detail tab. Cascade preview renders derivation chain RM1→RM2→intermediate→FG. Calls T-017 for write paths. RED tests/ui/tec-040-allergens.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-040-allergens.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Allergen profile editor + cascade preview tab using prototype declaration modal.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cascade preview lists each parent BOM line and the allergens it contributed (color-coded by source: cascaded vs override vs lab_result). Manual override flow: separate path (T-049 modal).
acceptance_criteria: Given the editor opens, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:309-347, then field set, source/intensity/confidence selectors, and Save/Cancel layout match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given an FG, when cascade preview renders, then each component is listed under its source label.
Given user without technical.allergens.edit, when modal opens, then Save is disabled.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + RBAC + cascade list.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass V-TEC-42 reason requirement when writing manual override.
